title: Stablecoins: Traditional Finance Turned Upside Down | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
This panel brings together Daniel Mangabeira (LatAm VP, Public Policy & Advocacy, Circle), Facundo Werning (LatAm Head, Agora), Daniel Lynch (Strategy Lead, Consensys), and Jamal Raees (Head of Payments, Polygon), moderated by Juan Manuel Campos (Partner, SyLS). The discussion explores how stablecoins are reshaping traditional finance, their growing role in payments and financial infrastructure, and the regulatory considerations emerging from their adoption.

This conversation was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day convened policymakers, regulators, founders, builders, and industry leaders to foster open dialogue around regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
